overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing nighttime exploration of ancient Thasos City. The character walks through wooded outskirts, stone ruins, a cemetery, and reaches a hilltop viewpoint overlooking the city and mountains under a full moon.

agents.ego_description: walking through a wooded area past a large stone statue and campfire, heading uphill on a dirt path

entered.detail: large robed figure on ornate pedestal with campfire at base
burning fire illuminating the statue base
small rustic structure with red fabric roof
trees with orange and red foliage lining the path
unpaved trail through grass and rocks
bright full moon visible through scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit wooded area outside an ancient city. A large stone statue stands near a campfire while the character walks along a dirt path surrounded by autumn-colored trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient cemetery with stone grave markers

events.description: entering a stone-walled cemetery area with ancient grave markers and pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through a cemetery path lined with stone pillars and walls, passing a burning campfire

entered.detail: ancient stone block wall lining the path
tall stone grave markers with decorative tops
green leafy tree among the stone ruins

segments.scene_description: The character enters an ancient cemetery enclosed by stone walls. Tall stone pillars mark graves along a cobblestone path, with a campfire burning against the wall and an olive tree providing sparse greenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone stairs and defensive ruins

events.description: ascending steep stone stairs through ancient defensive walls

agents.ego_description: climbing worn stone stairs and navigating through ruined walls and wooden barricades

entered.detail: worn stone steps leading steeply upward through ruins
plank barriers blocking parts of the ancient ruin

segments.scene_description: The path becomes steeper as the character ascends ancient stone stairs through defensive ruins. Wooden barricades block portions of the crumbling walls while the cobblestone path winds upward through the narrow stone corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop viewpoint overlooking ancient city and mountains

events.description: emerging from ruins to open viewpoint overlooking Thasos City and snow-capped mountains
camera tilts upward to focus on the night sky, full moon, and dramatic clouds

agents.ego_description: standing at a viewpoint overlooking the ancient city, then looking up at the moon and clouds

entered.detail: ancient city of Thasos with buildings and temples visible below
distant mountain range with white peaks under moonlight
low stone wall at viewpoint edge for safety
large stone fire bowl burning brightly

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the ruins, the scene opens to a breathtaking viewpoint overlooking the ancient city and distant snow-capped mountains. A stone brazier burns near the edge as the camera pans across the panorama before tilting upward to admire the full moon and dramatic night clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit wooded outskirts through ancient ruins, culminating in a panoramic hilltop vista. It begins on a dirt path among autumn-colored trees and a large stone statue, moving steadily toward an enclosed cemetery where tall pillars and a solitary olive tree line a cobblestone walkway. As the terrain rises, the scene shifts into a narrow stone corridor, ascending steep stairs past crumbling defensive walls and wooden barricades. The path finally emerges from the ruins to reveal a breathtaking viewpoint overlooking the ancient city and distant snow-capped mountains. The camera pans across this wide landscape beside a burning stone brazier before tilting upward toward a full moon and dramatic night clouds.
